title: COMMUNITYCONNECT - 211info
text: ANTFARM COMMUNITYCONNECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with yard maintenance tasks such as weeding, clearing gutters, planting, raking, and other services. 39140 Proctor Boulevard Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Older adults and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 668-7962 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 668-7962 Main phone (503) 668-9955 Alternate Main phone (503) 668-7962 Information and Scheduling Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None; donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97004, 97009, 97011, 97013, 97015, 97017, 97022, 97023, 97028, 97038, 97042, 97045, 97049, 97055, and 97067 SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Yard Maintenance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Yard Maintenance * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - AXIS LEARNING CENTER EMPLOYMENT - YOUTHCORE FOOD - ANTFARM LEARNING GARDENS INFORMATION SERVICES - NUEVO FUTURO SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - ANTFARM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ANTFARM
